message_text: I want to give an update about my remaining loan payment. I will not be able to pay this month.

I am an AI agent acting on behalf of Slice. This conversation is being logged. We are discussing the balance on account ****1184, with 8,400 currently due. To verify identity, please confirm the last 2 digits of the phone number on file.
02. I’m out of work right now, so I can’t pay at the moment.
Understood. I will note that you are dealing with hardship. Do you expect any income within 21 days?
No, I don’t expect any income in the next 21 days.
Understood. I will note ongoing hardship and no expected income within 21 days. You will be contacted by phone to discuss the available next steps for this account.

{"from_stage": "ASSESSMENT", "to_stage": "RESOLUTION", "summary": "Disclosures given: AI identity and logging disclosed earlier in chat. Verification complete by last 2 digits of phone on file: 02. Debt established with borrower using masked account ****1184 and amount due 8400 for Slice. Borrower stated they cannot pay this month, are out of work, and do not expect any income within 21 days. Hardship signal present: unemployment/no income; ongoing hardship; hardship review needed per policy. Assessment asked and completed the single required hardship timing question. Next stage should not repeat disclosures, debt establishment, verification, or the 21-day income question. Next priority: phone contact to discuss available next steps for this account under hardship review path."}

Okay, but that doesn’t change anything—I still can’t pay right now.

Under current Slice policy, if you have no income and cannot commit to any payment within 21 days, the only live path is hardship review for this account. I’ve noted that you still cannot pay right now. If you want, I can also note a limited contact preference to reach out only if an approved hardship option becomes available.
Yes, note that—I still don’t have any income, so I’m not agreeing to any payment.

Under current Slice policy, hardship review is the only live path on this account because you’ve stated you have no income and are not agreeing to any payment within 21 days. I’ve noted that position and your limited contact preference to be reached only if an approved hardship option becomes available.
